allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Code\\coveo-copydeck" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not \(Test-Path "C:\\Code\\coveo-copydeck"\)\) { Write-Output "Directory not found" })

PowerShell($zip = "$env:USERPROFILE\\OneDrive\\Bureau\\coveo-copydeck.zip"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $a = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($zip\); $names = $a.Entries | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; $a.Dispose\(\); "Total entries: $\($names.Count\)"; "Has node_modules: $\([bool]\($names -match '^node_modules/'\)\)"; "Has dist: $\([bool]\($names -match '^dist/'\)\)"; "--- top level ---"; $names | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '/'\)[0] } | Sort-Object -Unique)
